step_by_step_thinking:
Hyaluronidase, which breaks down hyaluronic acid in connective tissue, helps spread infection by making it easier for bacteria to disseminate through tissues. This fits with the description of a "diffuse spreading" pattern seen in many infectious processes where rapid dissemination contributes significantly to pathology.

My Answer: B (Hyaluronidase)
